affected_locations.label: entrypoint/wrapper
affected_locations.detail: client invokes habit-routine with answers and localRecommendations

affected_locations.label: root_control
affected_locations.detail: localRecommendations are sanitized and bounded, but answers has no equivalent sanitizer

affected_locations.label: closest_control
affected_locations.detail: Pro access and per-call AI quota are enforced before the model call

affected_locations.label: sink
affected_locations.detail: body.answers is embedded in the Gemini prompt payload

evidence: Endpoint sanitizes localRecommendations but forwards body.answers raw into Gemini request after per-call quota. Runtime request/body/token limits remain unknown.

facts: Authenticated Pro user submits oversized answers object with valid localRecommendations; endpoint consumes one quota unit and forwards answers into Gemini prompt, creating cost/latency amplification risk.
